chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail Appln. No. D – 91 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 23.10.2024 Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed M. Junejo, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< After arguing the matter at some length, learned counsel for the applicant submits that the applicant will be satisfied and would not press this bail application, if trial Court may be directed to expedite the trial and conclude it within a shortest possible time. Learned Addl.PG has no objection. Accordingly, the instant bail application is hereby dismissed as not pressed. However, the trial Court / Anti-Terrorism Court-II, Sukkkur is directed to expedite the trial and conclude it within a period of two months under intimation to this Court. Judge Judge ARBROHI
